message:
fix: add .into() for libc lock type constants on macOS aarch64

On macOS aarch64, libc::F_RDLCK/F_WRLCK/F_UNLCK are i16 but posix_lock()
expects i32. Added .into() at all 5 call sites so the code compiles on
both Linux (where they're i32) and macOS (where they're i16).

Bumps fsqlite-vfs to v0.1.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "fsqlite-vfs"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.1.2"
 description = "Virtual filesystem abstraction layer"
 edition.workspace = true
 license-file.workspace = true
